sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105367" key="tri/fallos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐ´-φαλλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φαλλός</etym>) title of Menippean Satire by Varro <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ ἀρρενότητος,</foreign> Non.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.191</biblScope> </bibl> L.</entryFree>
